items.title: FiK - Find My Car
items.des: It allows you to save the location of your car as well as directions to where you park your car, or to the nearest garage.

items.title: XFilm 18
items.des: Sex is an important aspect of every relationship – sometimes even more important than we would dare to admit..

App.info:
Introduce:

XHubs 18+ Pro serves as a porn aggregator, a type of website which gives access to adult content in a similar manner as YouTube does for general content.[6][7] Video clips from professional videos (sometimes pirated) are mixed with amateur and other types of content.[6][7] By 2012, XVideos was the largest adult website in the world, with over 4.4 billion page views per month.[8] Fabian Thylmann, the owner of MindGeek, attempted to purchase XVideos in 2012 in order to create a monopoly of pornographic tube sites. The French owner of XVideos turned down a reported offer of more than $120 million by saying, In 2014, XVideos controversially attempted to force content providers to either pledge to renounce the right to delete videos from their accounts or to shut down their accounts immediately.[9].
